tools.name: CreateDbCluster
tools.description: Create a new Timestream for InfluxDB database cluster.

name.description: The name that uniquely identifies the DB cluster when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands. This name will also be a prefix included in the endpoint.

db_instance_type.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance type to run InfluxDB on.

password.description: The password of the initial admin user created in InfluxDB. This password will allow you to access the InfluxDB UI to perform various administrative task and also use the InfluxDB CLI to create an operator token.

allocated_storage_gb.description: The amount of storage to allocate for your DB storage type in GiB (gibibytes).

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of VPC security group IDs to associate with the DB.

vpc_subnet_ids.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs to associate with the DB. Provide at least two VPC subnet IDs in different Availability Zones when deploying with a Multi-AZ standby.

publicly_accessible.description: Configures the DB with a public IP to facilitate access from outside the VPC.

username.description: The username of the initial admin user created in InfluxDB.

organization.description: The name of the initial organization for the initial admin user in InfluxDB.An InfluxDB organization is a workspace for a group of users

bucket.description: The name of the initial InfluxDB bucket.

db_storage_type.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type to read and write InfluxDB data.

deployment_type.description: Specifies whether the DB instance will be deployed as a standalone instance or with a Multi-AZ standby for high availability.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the network type of the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster is IPv4 or DUAL.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections. Default: 8086

db_parameter_group_identifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group to assign to your DB.

failover_mode.description: Specifies the behavior of failure recovery when the primary node of the cluster fails.

tags.description: A list of tags to assign to the DB.

log_delivery_configuration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to a specified S3 bucket.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: CreateDbInstance
tools.description: Create a new Timestream for InfluxDB database instance

db_instance_name.description: The name that uniquely identifies the DB instance. This name will also be a prefix included in the endpoint. DB instance names must be unique per customer and per region.

db_instance_type.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance type to run InfluxDB on.

password.description: The password of the initial admin user created in InfluxDB. This password will allow you to access the InfluxDB UI to perform various administrative task and also use the InfluxDB CLI to create an operator token.

allocated_storage_gb.description: The amount of storage to allocate for your DB storage type in GiB (gibibytes).

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of VPC security group IDs to associate with the DB.

vpc_subnet_ids.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs to associate with the DB. Provide at least two VPC subnet IDs in different Availability Zones when deploying with a Multi-AZ standby.

publicly_accessible.description: Configures the DB with a public IP to facilitate access from outside the VPC.

username.description: The username of the initial admin user created in InfluxDB.

organization.description: The name of the initial organization for the initial admin user in InfluxDB.An InfluxDB organization is a workspace for a group of users

bucket.description: The name of the initial InfluxDB bucket.

db_storage_type.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type to read and write InfluxDB data.

deployment_type.description: Specifies whether the DB instance will be deployed as a standalone instance or with a Multi-AZ standby for high availability.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the network type of the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster is IPv4 or DUAL.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections. Default: 8086

db_parameter_group_id.description: The id of the DB parameter group to assign to your DB.

tags.description: A list of tags to assign to the DB.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: LsInstancesOfCluster
tools.description: List all Timestream for InfluxDB instances belonging to a specific DB cluster.

db_cluster_id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster.

next_token.description: The pagination token. To resume pagination, provide the next-token value as an argument of a subsequent API invocation.

max_results.description: The maximum number of items to return in the output. If the total number of items available is more than the value specified, a nextToken is provided in the output.

tools.name: ListDbInstances
tools.description: List all Timestream for InfluxDB DB instances

next_token.description: The pagination token. To resume pagination, provide the next-token value as an argument of a subsequent API invocation.

max_results.description: The maximum number of items to return in the output. If the total number of items available is more than the value specified, a nextToken is provided in the output.

tools.name: ListDbClusters
tools.description: List all Timestream for InfluxDB DB clusters.

next_token.description: The pagination token. To resume pagination, provide the next-token value as an argument of a subsequent API invocation.

max_results.description: The maximum number of items to return in the output. If the total number of items available is more than the value specified, a nextToken is provided in the output.

tools.name: GetDbParameterGroup
tools.description: Get a Timestream for InfluxDB DB parameter group details for a db_parameter_group_id

identifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group.

tools.name: GetDbInstance
tools.description: Returns a Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance details by the instance-identifier

identifier.description: The id of the DB instance.

tools.name: GetDbCluster
tools.description: Returns a Timestream for InfluxDB DB cluster details by the db_cluster_id

db_cluster_id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster.

tools.name: DeleteDbInstance
tools.description: Deletes a Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance by the instance-identifier

identifier.description: The id of the DB instance.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: DeleteDbCluster
tools.description: Deletes a Timestream for InfluxDB cluster by the db_cluster_id

db_cluster_id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: ListDbParamGroups
tools.description: List all Timestream for InfluxDB DB parameter groups.

next_token.description: The pagination token. To resume pagination, provide the next-token value as an argument of a subsequent API invocation.

max_results.description: The maximum number of items to return in the output. If the total number of items available is more than the value specified, a nextToken is provided in the output.

tools.name: ListTagsForResource
tools.description: A list of tags applied to the resource.

resource_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the tagged resource.

tools.name: TagResource
tools.description: Tags are composed of a Key/Value pairs. Apply them to Timestream for InfluxDB resource.

resource_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the tagged resource.

tags.description: A list of key-value pairs as tags.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: UntagResource
tools.description: Removes the tags, identified by the keys, from the specified resource.

resource_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the tagged resource.

tag_keys.description: The keys used to identify the tags to remove.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: UpdateDbCluster
tools.description: Updates a Timestream for InfluxDB cluster.

db_cluster_id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster.

db_instance_type.description: Update the DB cluster to use the specified DB instance Type.

db_parameter_group_identifier.description: Update the DB cluster to use the specified DB parameter group.

port.description: Update the DB cluster to use the specified port.

failover_mode.description: Update the DB cluster's failover behavior.

log_delivery_configuration.description: The log delivery configuration to apply to the DB cluster.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: UpdateDbInstance
tools.description: Updates a Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance.

identifier.description: The id of the DB instance.

db_instance_type.description: Update the DB cluster to use the specified DB instance Type.

db_parameter_group_identifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group to assign to your DB.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections. Default: 8086

allocated_storage_gb.description: The amount of storage to allocate for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

db_storage_type.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type to read and write InfluxDB data.

deployment_type.description: Specifies whether the DB instance will be deployed as a standalone instance or with a Multi-AZ standby for high availability.

log_delivery_configuration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to a specified S3 bucket.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: LsInstancesByStatus
tools.description: Returns a list of Timestream for InfluxDB DB instances filtered by status (case-insensitive).

status.description: The status to filter DB instances by (case-insensitive).

tools.name: ListClustersByStatus
tools.description: Returns a list of Timestream for InfluxDB DB clusters filtered by status (case-insensitive).

status.description: The status to filter DB clusters by (case-insensitive).

tools.name: CreateDbParamGroup
tools.description: Creates a new Timestream for InfluxDB DB parameter group to associate with DB instances.

name.description: The name of the DB parameter group. The name must be unique per customer and per region.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

description.description: A description of the DB parameter group.

parameters.description: A list of the parameters that comprise the DB parameter group.

tags.description: A list of tags to assign to the DB.

tools.name: InfluxDBWritePoints
tools.description: Write data points to InfluxDB endpoint.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

org.description: The organization name. Falls back to INFLUXDB_ORG env var if not provided.

points.description: List of data points to write. Each point should be a dictionary with measurement, tags, fields, and optional time.

time_precision.description: The precision for the unix timestamps within the body line-protocol. One of: ns, us, ms, s (default is ns).

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: InfluxDBWriteLP
tools.description: Write data in Line Protocol format to InfluxDB.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

org.description: The organization name. Falls back to INFLUXDB_ORG env var if not provided.

data_line_protocol.description: Data in InfluxDB Line Protocol format.

time_precision.description: The precision for the unix timestamps within the body line-protocol. One of: ns, us, ms, s (default is ns).

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: InfluxDBQuery
tools.description: Query data from InfluxDB using Flux query language.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

org.description: The organization name. Falls back to INFLUXDB_ORG env var if not provided.

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tools.name: InfluxDBListBuckets
tools.description: List all buckets in InfluxDB.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

org.description: The organization name. Falls back to INFLUXDB_ORG env var if not provided.

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tools.name: InfluxDBCreateBucket
tools.description: Create a new bucket in InfluxDB.

bucket_name.description: The name of the bucket to create.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

org.description: The organization name. Falls back to INFLUXDB_ORG env var if not provided.

retention_seconds.description: Retention period in seconds. 0 or None means infinite retention.

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)

tools.name: InfluxDBListOrgs

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tools.description: Create a new organization in InfluxDB.

url.description: The URL of the InfluxDB server. Falls back to INFLUXDB_URL env var if not provided.

token.description: The authentication token. Falls back to INFLUXDB_TOKEN env var if not provided.

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL with https connections.

tool_write_mode.description: Tool is run in write mode and will be able to perform any create/update/delete operations. Default is read-only mode (False)
